title: LORD, from the Depths to You I Cry

verses.text: If you, O LORD, should mark our sins, Then who, O Lord, could stand? But pardon can be found with you That you may fear command.
I wait, my soul awaits the LORD, My hope is his word. Yes, more than watchmen wait for dawn, My soul awaits the Lord.
O Isr’el in God the LORD, For mercy is with him; With great redemption he will save His Isr’el from all sin
